summary: Verified all changes are present in local main.py and bot.py files: new message format with full greeting, admin panel with 4 new buttons, and text-only sending without photos. However, git shows 'nothing to commit' - changes may not be staged or there's a git state issue. User needs to run 'git status' and 'git add .' then commit and push.
current_status: All code changes complete and verified locally. Git staging issue preventing commit. Once resolved and pushed, server can pull and deploy.
